personas.name: Frustrated Tech Troubleshooter
personas.description: A user who experiences app crashes and glitches, and tries troubleshooting steps to resolve the issues.
goals: Use the app for meditation and tracking without interruptions
pain_points: App crashes and glitches, compatibility issues with device
context: Tries to troubleshoot issues by clearing cache, reinstalling, and seeking support
constraints: Limited by device compatibility and app version issues

personas.name: Frustrated Speed Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking a smooth and fast experience with the app, but faces numerous bugs and performance issues.
goals: Access to rich catalogue and tools
pain_points: Error messages despite stable internet connection
context: Using the app with a stable internet connection
Expecting a smooth and fast experience
constraints: App performance issues on their device

personas.name: Disappointed Headspace User
personas.description: A user who has seen a decline in the quality of Headspace's service and customer support.
goals: Get effective meditation and mindfulness support
context: Heavy user of Headspace for stress relief
constraints: Limited time and patience for resolving issues

personas.name: Frustrated Meditator Fiona
personas.description: Fiona seeks a reliable meditation experience but faces consistent technical issues. She wants to focus on her mindfulness practice without interruptions.
goals: Achieve a meditative state without interruptions
pain_points: App crashes and loses audio stream
Inconsistent performance since AI features were added
context: Uses the app for meditation on her Samsung S25 Ultra
constraints: Technical issues hinder her meditation practice

personas.name: Frustrated Tech User
personas.description: A tech-savvy user experiencing frustrating app performance issues, including slow loading times, crashes, and syncing problems.
context: Using the app daily for fitness tracking
